findings.description: `ValidationContext` appears in the s2 code example (`validateForRegister(ValidationContext<W11AC02Form> context)`) but is absent from s2 hints. It is present in s3 hints, so users searching for it would land on s3 rather than s2.
findings.source_evidence: Source section `form_validation`: `public static void validateForRegister(ValidationContext<W11AC02Form> context)` — ValidationContext is a key class in the s2 implementation code.
